_meta.purpose: Read-only bridge dispatch fixture for measuring per-role tool routing quality.

tasks.prompt: Find SmartBridge class definition and report (1) file path + line range, (2) resolve() vs resolveSync() difference, (3) which one is used at session creation. Read-only — do not edit. 5-8 lines.

In ai-wrapped-dispatch.mjs, locate the _internals.builders export and report (1) which tools (recall/search/explore) have builders, (2) how prompt-variant swapping works at probe time, (3) the default builder for explore. Read-only. 5-8 lines.

Find tool-loop-guard.mjs and report the family-threshold policy: (1) how many families are tracked, (2) the structure_probe family threshold + abort threshold, (3) what action triggers a family counter reset. Read-only. 5-8 lines.

Review the 'Edit Ordering' section in rules/shared/01-tool.md. Evaluate (1) clarity for LLM compliance, (2) whether the rules conflict with the existing Decision Table, (3) if the 'two grep+read alternations is a violation' threshold is too strict or too loose. 6-10 lines.
Review bench/probe.mjs and compare the 'run' and 'sweep' commands: (1) what each mode does, (2) what artifacts each mode writes, (3) when to choose one over the other. 6-10 lines.

We suspect that the bridge tool's cwd argument is not propagated to the worker session. Trace where 'cwd' enters the bridge dispatch path and where (if anywhere) it is dropped before reaching the worker's tool dispatch. Report the call chain and suspected drop point. 6-10 lines.

Worker role's iter p95 in 24h trace is 88. Investigate one likely cause from the codebase (loop control, retry policy, no early-stop condition) and report: (1) which file controls worker iter loop, (2) what conditions allow iter to grow past 50, (3) one concrete fix candidate. 6-10 lines.
